SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector SPARSE_NEAR $sv LIMIT 5

SELECT similarity() FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10
SELECT ctx.* FROM t AS ctx WHERE vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10
SELECT title, similarity() AS relevance FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10

SELECT * FROM t WHERE vector NEAR $v ORDER BY similarity() DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT 10
